opinion.h4: GRANIERI v. SALT LAKE CITY. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF UTAH. No. 202, Misc. Decided October 11, 1965.
opinion.p: The appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
KASHARIAN v. HALPERN ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE DISTRICT OF NEW JERSEY. No. 389, Misc. Decided October 11, 1965.
The appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction.
